# featureColumns

**Instance Property**

The names of the columns you selected at initialization to train the classifier.

## Declaration

```swift
var featureColumns: [String]
```

## Discussion

Changing the value of this property doesn’t retrain the model or affect its behavior.

## Training a decision tree classifier synchronously

- **train(trainingData:targetColumn:featureColumns:parameters:sessionParameters:)**: Trains a decision tree classifier.
- **targetColumn**: The name of the column you selected at initialization to define which categories the classifier predicts.
